managingRoleArn.description: The managing AWS IAM role ARN that can assume cross-account roles

serviceAccountEmail.description: Service account email for management roles

managementPrincipalId.description: Management service principal object ID for local development fallback

managingTenantId.description: The managing Azure Tenant ID for cross-tenant access

oidcIssuer.description: OIDC issuer URL for federated identity credential creation

oidcSubject.description: OIDC subject claim for federated identity credential creation

description:
Management configuration for different cloud platforms.

Platform-derived configuration for cross-account/cross-tenant access.
This is NOT user-specified - it's derived from the Manager's ServiceAccount.
